title: Daily news digest for today
body:
## Task

Search for today's hot news and save a digest in the `news/` directory.

### Requirements:
1. Create `news/hot-news-{today's date}.md`
2. Include at least 10 trending news items
3. Organize by category (Tech, World, Science, Business, etc.)
4. Each item: title, brief summary, source
5. Use proper markdown formatting
